creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)

Thank you.  :)

But I do have one question. Why did the order of MASTERDIR, DISTINFOFILE, and FILESDIR needed to be changed in Makefile after all this time? The only changes to the Makefile in the patch was to change the PORTVERSION and DISTVERSIONSUFFIX.
